title: The Chomsky Hierarchy of Formal Languages and Their Computational Models
description: A flowchart illustrating the containment hierarchy of formal language classes, their corresponding automata, and the type of grammar that generates them, as defined in the Chomsky hierarchy.
relationships: Each language class is a proper subset of the one below it (e.g., Regular ⊂ Context-Free ⊂ Context-Sensitive ⊂ Recursively Enumerable)
